title: Copycats+ aeronautics weight
description: This mods is a compat between create aeronautics and copycats+ by adding more reasonable kpg(mass)  values to copycat blocks.
body:
This mod adds reasonable kpg (mass) to copycat+ blocks for the Sable physics library 
(create aeronautics etc). It includes kpg for all blocks from copycats+ including ones like copycat layers where more layers equals more kpg.

![Thank you for 100k downloads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f0cb7ee85869ed823c19fd0dbac66307a96cd2d.png)
